evals.prompt: I'm on Scandit SDK v6 and need to migrate my SparkScan Cordova integration to v7. Here's my scanner file: ScannerApp_v6.js
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md, applies the 6→7 property renames and removes deprecated properties in ScannerApp_v6.js, and summarizes all changes made.

assertions.text: torchControlVisible is present in the output file
torchButtonVisible is NOT present in the output file
triggerButtonTintColor is present in the output file
captureButtonTintColor is NOT present in the output file
captureButtonBackgroundColor is NOT present in the output file
At least one of triggerButtonCollapsedColor, triggerButtonExpandedColor, triggerButtonAnimationColor is present if the input set a trigger background color
barcodeFindButtonVisible is present in the output file
fastFindButtonVisible is NOT present in the output file

Removed v6 properties (handModeButtonVisible, soundModeButtonVisible, hapticModeButtonVisible, shouldShowScanAreaGuides, captureButtonActiveBackgroundColor, stopCapturingText, startCapturingText, resumeCapturingText, scanningCapturingText) are NOT present
A summary.md file is present describing changes

evals.prompt: We're upgrading our Cordova app from Scandit SDK 7 to 8. Here's our SparkScan code: ScannerApp_v7.js. Please apply any necessary changes.
evals.expected_output: The skill applies the v7→v8 renames (DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey → DataCaptureContext.initialize, SparkScan.forSettings → new SparkScan) and summarizes the changes.

assertions.text: Scandit.DataCaptureContext.initialize( is present in the output file
Scandit.DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is NOT present in the output file
new Scandit.SparkScan( is present in the output file
Scandit.SparkScan.forSettings( is NOT present in the output file
A summary.md is present listing the two renames
Summary mentions cordova prepare (or equivalent rebuild step) must be run after the plugin version bump
The output file is functionally equivalent to the input otherwise — no unnecessary changes

evals.prompt: We need to upgrade our SparkScan integration from SDK 6 all the way to v8. Here's our current code: ScannerApp_v6.js
evals.expected_output: The skill applies both migrations in order (6→7 then 7→8) and summarizes all changes organized by migration step.

assertions.text: torchControlVisible is present (6→7 rename applied)
torchButtonVisible is NOT present
barcodeFindButtonVisible is present (6→7 rename applied)
fastFindButtonVisible is NOT present
Scandit.DataCaptureContext.initialize( is present (7→8 rename applied)
Scandit.DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is NOT present
new Scandit.SparkScan( is present (7→8 rename applied)
Scandit.SparkScan.forSettings( is NOT present
Removed v6 properties (handModeButtonVisible, soundModeButtonVisible, hapticModeButtonVisible, captureButtonActiveBackgroundColor) are NOT present
Summary covers both migration steps (references both 6→7 and 7→8)

evals.prompt: I want to upgrade my SparkScan to the latest Scandit SDK version. Here's my code and config.xml.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads config.xml to detect v6.28.x, determines the target is v8, applies both migrations without asking the user for their version.

assertions.text: Summary mentions the detected version (6.28.x or v6)
Summary mentions the config.xml plugin specs need to be bumped to ^8.0.0
Summary mentions cordova prepare (or equivalent) must be run after the bump
torchControlVisible is present (6→7 rename applied)
torchButtonVisible is NOT present
Scandit.DataCaptureContext.initialize( is present (7→8 rename applied)
new Scandit.SparkScan( is present (7→8 rename applied)
Removed v6 properties (handModeButtonVisible, soundModeButtonVisible, hapticModeButtonVisible, captureButtonActiveBackgroundColor) are NOT present
Did not ask the user for their version — proceeded autonomously
